meta.title: Origins of Staphylococcus epidermidis and Streptococcus oralis causing bacteraemia in a bone marrow transplant patient

abstractHtml: Departments of Microbiology and *Haematology, Royal Hospital for Sick Children, Yorkhill NHS Trust, Glasgow, †Scottish MRSA Reference Laboratory and University Department of Bacteriology, Glasgow Royal Infirmary, Glasgow, ‡Epidemiological Typing Unit, Laboratory of Hospital Infection, Central Public Health Laboratory, London and Department of Oral Microbiology, Glasgow Dental Hospital and School, Glasgow
